package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_returns_preformatted_client_message: Services that return final client-facing message strings instead of typed domain errors.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule179NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule179NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule179NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario179Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule179NegativeService, input Rule179NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
